overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing the player navigating elevated scaffolding and walkways in a dense futuristic city at night. The camera moves through narrow industrial corridors with neon signage before emerging onto open high-rise platforms with panoramic views of the surrounding megastructures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial scaffolding corridor with yellow structural beams

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through a tight corridor formed by yellow structural beams and metal walkways

entered.detail: large industrial yellow support beams forming the corridor wall
metal mesh walkway floor with visible gaps
vertical teal neon sign with foreign characters on the right wall
large pink glowing holographic advertisement visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow industrial corridor defined by prominent yellow structural beams on the left and neon signage on the right. The metal grating floor reveals the depth below as the camera advances steadily toward a distant pink holographic display.

scene_state.functional_zone: rusted metal scaffolding bridge with cable supports

events.description: exits the yellow beam corridor and enters open metal scaffolding structure with visible cable supports

agents.ego_description: traversing the metal scaffolding walkway with rusted support columns on either side

entered.detail: rusted metal scaffolding with cross-bracing and cable supports
vertical rusted steel columns with red warning lights attached
small red indicator lights mounted on the scaffolding structure

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to exposed metal scaffolding with rusted support columns and red warning lights. The player continues forward through this industrial bridge structure as the previously prominent yellow beams recede behind and the neon signage moves further into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: steps from metal grating onto white tiled platform with curved railings and expansive city views
steam vents activate on the left side, releasing white vapor across the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved elevated platform overlooking the cyberpunk cityscape below

entered.detail: clean white tiled walkway surface with geometric patterns
silver metal safety railing curving along the platform edge
tall teal-colored residential tower with multiple balconies
massive curved megastructure with grid-patterned facade
industrial vents releasing white steam across the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto a wide elevated walkway with white tiled flooring and curved metal railings, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk city. Tall megastructures flank both sides while steam vents release vapor across the path, and distant holographic advertisements glow against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vast, open panoramic vista of a futuristic city. It begins by advancing through a narrow passage defined by yellow structural beams and neon signage, with a metal grating floor revealing the depth below. As the camera pushes forward, the environment shifts into a series of exposed metal scaffolding and rusted support columns illuminated by red warning lights. The scene then opens up as the player emerges from the industrial bridge onto a wide, white-tiled elevated walkway with curved railings. Finally, the view expands to reveal towering megastructures and glowing holographic advertisements against the night sky, with steam vents releasing vapor across the path.
